description: Every ShipsGo endpoint, plus an RFQ workspace, lane analytics, and an offline shipment book no other tool offers.

novel_features.name: RFQ workspace
novel_features.description: Create, populate, and inspect an RFQ workspace that groups multiple tracked shipments under one quote slug.

novel_features.name: RFQ carrier comparison
novel_features.description: For one RFQ slug, group its shipments by carrier and emit mean actual transit days, ETA-vs-actual delta, and shipment count.

novel_features.name: Lane statistics
novel_features.description: Across all locally tracked shipments on an origin→destination lane, report p50/p90 transit days with per-carrier breakdown.

novel_features.name: ETA drift detector
novel_features.description: List shipments whose ETA shifted by more than N days since the last sync — sorted by drift magnitude.

novel_features.name: Credit budget guardrail
novel_features.description: Read ShipsGo X-RateLimit-* headers from the last response, combine with local dedupe state, and refuse new POSTs when the reserve would be breached.

novel_features.name: Unified shipment book
novel_features.description: Single view across ocean + air shipments, filterable by ETA window, status, tag, port, or carrier — backed by FTS5 and local indices.

novel_features.name: Carrier reliability score
novel_features.description: Median(actual_delivery − original_eta) and on-time percentage for a carrier, optionally scoped to a specific lane.

novel_features.name: Webhook event tail
novel_features.description: Tail the locally stored webhook_events table chronologically; supports --since, --shipment, and --watch.

novel_features.name: Pre-write dupe check
novel_features.description: Look up a container number or AWB in the local store and exit non-zero with the existing shipment id if already tracked.

novel_features.name: RFQ stakeholder digest
novel_features.description: Emit a structured table of shipment id, last milestone, current ETA, and ETA-delta since last digest, scoped to an RFQ or a time window.

novel_features.name: RFQ follower fan-out
novel_features.description: Add or remove one follower email across every shipment in an RFQ in one command, gated by credit-budget and --dry-run.
